name: homeassistant-analog-cards
description: A family of Home Assistant Lovelace custom cards styled as realistic analog instruments.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=analog-cards-core && npm run build --workspace=analog-barometer-card && npm run build --workspace=analog-thermometer-radial-card && npm run build --workspace=analog-thermometer-mercury-card && npm run build --workspace=analog-humidity-radial-card && npm run build --workspace=analog-clock-card && npm run build --workspace=analog-cards-bundle
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=analog-cards-core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
